name: T2.4-prores-4k-plus-h264-1080p-hls
description: ProRes 4K screen writer (raw SCStream path) + composited H.264 HLS at 1080p @ 6Mbps (CIContext scales 4K screen to 1080p, no camera overlay). Confirms the ProRes-plus-one-H.264 base case works — one H.264 engine, one ProRes engine, one CIContext. If this fails, something is wrong with having both engines active concurrently even at a modest HLS bitrate.
